title: SRS Federation Events File (ext:federation)
description: Holds FederationEvent records for a repository. Tracks merge, split, and import operations so structural provenance remains auditable without polluting the instance index.

repositoryId.description: The repository these events belong to. Must match the enclosing repository's repositoryId (Invariant 60).

event.description: 'merge': instances from another repo were absorbed. 'split': instances were moved out to a new repo. 'import': read-only copy of instances was made.

performedBy.description: Name or identifier of the actor who performed the operation.

sourceRepositoryId.description: Required for 'merge' and 'import': the repository instances arrived from (Invariant 59).

targetRepositoryId.description: Required for 'split': the new repository instances were moved into (Invariant 59).

affectedInstanceIds.description: The instance IDs involved. Must be non-empty (Invariant 59).

strategy.description: The copy strategy used. Absent when not applicable or unknown.

note.description: Human-readable explanation of why the operation was performed.
